name: Billy Roberts
abstract: William Moses Roberts Jr. (August 16, 1936 – October 7, 2017) was an American songwriter and musician credited with composing the 1960s rock music standard "Hey Joe."

about_quotes.speaker: John Malachi
about_quotes.evidence: One of the fellows that used to come by the same club where I used to meet all of these musicians was a fellow whose name was Billy Roberts... Somehow he got the idea in his head that he would like to have a band of youngsters. By knowing me...
